narration: Explain the bubble sort algorithm conceptually: it iterates through the list, comparing adjacent elements and swapping them if out of order, repeating until no swaps occur.
Implement the bubble sort algorithm in Java using a nested loop structure with a boolean flag to track swaps.
Test the bubble sort implementation with arrays of increasing sizes (10, 100,000, and 1,000,000 elements) to demonstrate performance differences.
Explain the time complexity of bubble sort as O(n^2) and its implications for large datasets.
